summary: Complete testing of Solomon AI Church Management System - Pastor Meetings, Abundant Pathways, Merch Store, Cafe, Solomon Chat features. All 12 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend verification confirmed all requested features working correctly.

issues: Multiple duplicate 'Marriage Retreat' events showing on same date (Apr 5) - appears to be seed data duplication issue from previous iterations

details: Admin can view all meeting slots (/api/admin/meetings/slots)
Admin can create new meeting slots with date, time, location
Admin can view all scheduled meetings (/api/admin/meetings)
UI shows Meeting Slots section with BOOKED/OPEN status
Scheduled Meetings card shows member name, topic, notes textarea
Save Notes, Record Meeting, Upload Audio buttons present
Member sees only OPEN slots (/api/portal/meetings/slots)
Member can book available slot with topic and notes
Booking creates meeting and marks slot as BOOKED
MOCKED Teams/Slack notifications returned
UI shows Available Time Slots, Book a Session form, Upcoming Sessions
8 courses available for member (verified via API)
Courses: Abundant Next Steps, Preparing for Baptism, Foundations of Discipleship, Financial Peace University, Serving with Purpose, Prayer & Presence, Marriage & Family Care, Mission & Outreach
Each course shows title, description, cover image, lessons count, progress
Start button available on each course card
Ask Solomon FAB button opens chat panel
Chat panel shows title 'Solomon - AI Church Assistant'
Sample prompts displayed for quick questions
Input field with placeholder 'Ask Solomon...'
Microphone button for voice input visible and styled correctly
Send button present and functional
Chat sends messages and shows 'Solomon is thinking...' loading state
Ask Solomon widget with personalized message
Leave a Note card with Subject, Category dropdown, Message textarea, Send Note button
Quick actions: Give Now, My Groups, Upcoming Events
Upcoming events section visible
7+ products displayed for members
Products: SO BE IT Vinyl, Hoodie, T-Shirt, Camo Hat, Tote, Ceramic Mug, YETI Tumbler
Category filters: All, Music, Apparel, Accessories, Drinkware
Cart button, Search functionality present
Featured badges displayed on products
7 menu items displayed
Items: House Latte ($5), Cold Brew ($4), Cappuccino ($5), Chai Latte ($4), Iced Matcha ($5), Blueberry Muffin ($3), Butter Croissant
Category filters: All, Coffee, Tea, Pastry
Pickup time and location displayed
Add to order buttons on each item
Member can submit note to leadership via /api/portal/notes
Subject, message, category fields work correctly
Note created with member name and email attached

critical_code_review_comments: Pastor Meeting APIs properly implemented with slot management and booking flow
Abundant Pathways has 8 courses properly seeded for abundant-church-001 tenant
Solomon Chat voice input has mic button with data-testid='samson-mic-btn'
Leave a Note feature integrated on Portal Home page
MOCKED: Teams/Slack meeting notifications return MOCKED status (as expected)
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_pastor_meetings_pathways_iter11.py - New test suite for Pastor Meetings, Pathways, Merch, Cafe features
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - using existing demo data from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Pastor Meeting, Pathways, Solomon Chat voice, Merch, and Cafe features tested and working. Pastor Meetings: Admin creates slots at /meetings, members book at /portal/meet (Meet nav). Abundant Pathways: 8 courses visible at /portal/pathways. Solomon Chat: FAB button opens panel with mic button for voice input. Merch: 7+ products at /portal/merch. Cafe: 7 items at /portal/cafe. Leave a Note: On Portal Home with subject/category/message fields.

mocked_apis_list: notify_meeting_event - Returns mocked Teams/Slack notification responses
